ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the country */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suicide_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the statistic applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic */,
  "suicides_no" INTEGER /* Number of suicides recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population for the demographic in that year */,
  "suicides_per_100k" REAL /* Suicides per 100,000 population */,
  "hdi_score" REAL /* Human Development Index score for the year */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product for the year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the year */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation classification (e.g., Generation X, Boomers) */,
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the GDP data table */,
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HDI data table */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country or region */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the country or region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_gdp_id FOREIGN KEY ("gdp_id") REFERENCES gdp_data ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_hdi_id FOREIGN KEY ("hdi_id") REFERENCES hdi_data ("hdi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP for that year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for that year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_data" (
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDI entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the HDI data */,
  "hdi_score" REAL /* Human Development Index score for that year */,
  "hdi_rank" INTEGER /* HDI rank of the country for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for that demographic */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age groups table */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sexes table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., male, female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation (e.g., Generation X, Boomers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the program started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the program ended (if applicable) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the program is implemented */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the intervention program (e.g., awareness, training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_programs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the effectiveness entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention program */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the effectiveness was assessed */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistic affected by the program */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the program (e.g., reduced suicides by X%) */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Score indicating the effectiveness of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_effectiveness_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES suicide_statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_effectiveness_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES intervention_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "generated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., country statistics, intervention effectiveness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
